subjects.description: Stickman character with a confused expression, wearing a simple t-shirt, holding an empty digital wallet.
subjects.action: Looking intensely at a digital screen showing a shrinking bank balance icon.

image_prompt.environment: Minimalist home setting with abstract floating icons of money vanishing.
image_prompt.lighting: Cool blue tones with a red alert flashing on the screen.
image_prompt.composition: Close-up shot on the character's face.
image_prompt.style: Dynamic hand-drawn 2D webcomic sketch style, thick expressive black ink outlines, vibrant minimalist color palette for highlights, clean shading, white background with glowing accents.

video_prompt.motion: The character rubs his head in frustration while numbers on the screen decrease rapidly.
video_prompt.camera_movement: Slow zoom in on the character's face.

scenes.narration: Tu cuenta bancaria disminuye cada mes y no sabes exactamente a dónde se fue todo.

subjects.description: Stickman character looking at a massive, messy pile of bills and receipts surrounding him.
subjects.action: Pointing at a giant question mark floating above his head.

image_prompt.environment: A cluttered room representing financial chaos.
image_prompt.lighting: Dim, greyish tones highlighting the messy papers.
image_prompt.style: Dynamic hand-drawn 2D webcomic sketch style, thick expressive black ink outlines, vibrant minimalist color palette for highlights, clean shading, white background with glowing accents.

video_prompt.motion: The character gestures toward the mess, clearly overwhelmed.
video_prompt.camera_movement: Pan across the room showing the pile of bills.

scenes.narration: Es el problema del dinero invisible: gastos que se escapan sin control.

subjects.description: Stickman holding a bag of money that has holes in the bottom, with coins dropping out.
subjects.action: Walking forward while coins scatter behind him.

image_prompt.lighting: Shadowy background with bright green coins hitting the floor.
image_prompt.style: Dynamic hand-drawn 2D webcomic sketch style, thick expressive black ink outlines, vibrant minimalist color palette for highlights, clean shading, white background with glowing accents.

video_prompt.motion: The character walks steadily while coins fall rhythmically from his leaking bag.

scenes.narration: El error común es gastar todo sin priorizar tu futuro primero.

subjects.action: Looking at a signpost that says 'Desorden Financiero' vs 'Control Total'.

image_prompt.environment: Empty white space with a stylized road.
image_prompt.style: Dynamic hand-drawn 2D webcomic sketch style, thick expressive black ink outlines, vibrant minimalist color palette for highlights, clean shading, white background with glowing accents.

video_prompt.motion: The character pauses and looks at both signs.

scenes.narration: Es hora de cambiar las reglas del juego.

subjects.description: Stickman character confidently presenting a large pie chart graphic.
subjects.action: Pointing at the chart with a marker.

image_prompt.lighting: Bright, clear studio lighting with vibrant colors.
image_prompt.style: Dynamic hand-drawn 2D webcomic sketch style, thick expressive black ink outlines, vibrant minimalist color palette for highlights, clean shading, white background with glowing accents.

video_prompt.motion: The character draws slices on the pie chart labeled 50, 30, and 20.

subjects.description: Stickman character with a magnifying glass examining a segment marked 50%.

image_prompt.style: Dynamic hand-drawn 2D webcomic sketch style, thick expressive black ink outlines, vibrant minimalist color palette for highlights, clean shading, white background with glowing accents.

video_prompt.motion: The magnifying glass glides over the 50% slice.

scenes.narration: El 50% es para tus necesidades básicas: vivienda, comida y servicios.

subjects.description: Stickman character with a smile, interacting with a thought bubble showing icons of a movie and coffee.

image_prompt.style: Dynamic hand-drawn 2D webcomic sketch style, thick expressive black ink outlines, vibrant minimalist color palette for highlights, clean shading, white background with glowing accents.

video_prompt.motion: The character pats his pockets comfortably.

scenes.narration: El 30% es para tus deseos personales: ese café o el cine.

subjects.description: Stickman character placing gold coins into a growing digital piggy bank marked 20%.

image_prompt.environment: Bright glowing safe icon in the background.
image_prompt.lighting: Golden highlights reflecting off the piggy bank.
image_prompt.style: Dynamic hand-drawn 2D webcomic sketch style, thick expressive black ink outlines, vibrant minimalist color palette for highlights, clean shading, white background with glowing accents.

video_prompt.motion: The piggy bank shakes with each coin, growing slightly larger.

scenes.narration: Y el 20% más importante: tu ahorro automático para el futuro.

subjects.description: Stickman character with a calendar, circling the 'Payday' date.
subjects.action: Drawing a checkmark on the calendar.

image_prompt.style: Dynamic hand-drawn 2D webcomic sketch style, thick expressive black ink outlines, vibrant minimalist color palette for highlights, clean shading, white background with glowing accents.

scenes.narration: Divide tu sueldo apenas lo recibas, no al final.

subjects.description: Stickman character standing tall, looking at a wall of successful financial growth charts.

image_prompt.style: Dynamic hand-drawn 2D webcomic sketch style, thick expressive black ink outlines, vibrant minimalist color palette for highlights, clean shading, white background with glowing accents.

video_prompt.motion: The character stands firm as the charts glow green.

subjects.description: Stickman character with a thumbs up.
subjects.action: Pointing at the screen as if speaking directly to the viewer.

image_prompt.style: Dynamic hand-drawn 2D webcomic sketch style, thick expressive black ink outlines, vibrant minimalist color palette for highlights, clean shading, white background with glowing accents.

scenes.narration: Empieza hoy mismo y toma el control de tu dinero. ¡Sígueme para más consejos!
